test-code.description: test class must not be private
test class must not be private, even if the test methods are in a parent class
test class must not be private, even if the test methods are in a parent class (parent is in different .class file)
test-code.code:
import net.sourceforge.pmd.lang.java.rule.errorprone.junit5testnoprivatemodifier.ParentWithTest;
private class Child extends ParentWithTest {}
